name: Soul City QLD
agency: Brisbane Bands / Brisbane Jazz Bands agency (07 3350 5078)
notes: 9-piece high energy party band. Billed as Queensland's number one 9 piece high energy party band. Fraser Coast based but operates across SEQ. One of the region's most established function acts.

name: sisterMISTER
notes: Billed as Australia's premier corporate band. Highly regarded Brisbane act with dynamic line-up. Represented by Australian Network Entertainment. Long-established reputation in the corporate entertainment space.

name: Uptimez Band
notes: One of Brisbane's leading cover bands. Fronted by two female vocalists (Michelle Bermingham and Sally Christiansen). Mix of classic and contemporary pop and rock. Self-books directly. Active as of 2025.

name: Fifth Avenue
notes: 5-piece funk/disco/soul party band. 70s to present. Available as duo/trio through to 6-piece with sax. Specialises in weddings and private events. Self-books. Active, well-reviewed on CrowdPleaser.

name: Lost Safari
notes: 6-piece Brisbane party band featuring musicians from Australia and internationally. 70s/80s party classics including disco, retro rock. Ultimate high-energy party band. Listed on Easy Weddings.

name: Honey
notes: 7-piece powerhouse act featuring three female vocalists with glamour, costumes and choreography. Top 40, 80s rock, 70s, 60s and jazz fusion. Previously worked alongside Kylie Minogue, Keith Urban, The Corrs. Well-established Brisbane act.

name: No Standing
agency: Brisbane Bands / Cover Bands Brisbane agency
notes: Described as Brisbane's most in-demand covers band. High-energy stage show with scorching guitars and searing vocals. Been operating for over 13 years. Strong pubs and venue reputation.

name: Saccharo
notes: 7-piece covers band with funky vibe and modern style. Active Instagram presence (@saccharo.band). Brisbane-based. 679 Facebook likes. Self-books.

name: ANTHEMS! LIVE BAND
notes: Mega-hits from 60s to today. Comedy medleys and sing-along interaction with crowd. Large corporate and wedding events. Travels nationwide. Top-booked on CrowdPleaser Brisbane. Very active in 2025.

name: Elevation Band
notes: Award-winning premium wedding band. Ranges from solo acoustic to full band (up to 8-piece). Led by Rob McMullan. Collective century of experience. Top-booked on CrowdPleaser. Performs hundreds of events per year, books months in advance. Also trades as Elevation Live Band. Strong reviews from Gold Coast and Brisbane corporates.

name: First Summer
notes: 6-piece Brisbane covers band playing hits from 70s, 80s, 90s, and today. Top-booked on CrowdPleaser Brisbane. Self-books. Active and professional.

name: Alternator
notes: Well-established Brisbane cover band performing across all of SEQ. Versatile setlists for all venue types. Long-standing act in the Brisbane entertainment scene.

name: Follow The Fox
notes: Gold Coast based 4-piece covers band fronted by a talented female vocalist. Plays classic hits everyone loves. Represented by Brisbane Bands agency but primarily Gold Coast act. YouTube channel: Follow The Fox Gold Coast.

name: THE HITMEN
notes: Popular Gold Coast party band originally formed in Tokyo. Performs killer hits from 60s, 70s, 80s and now. Trio or 4-piece. Can do dinner music through to pumping dance music. Self-books. Strong local following. Facebook: @bestpartyband.

name: Exit 69
notes: Versatile 5-piece 100% live Gold Coast band. Over 10 years on the Gold Coast scene. Experienced musicians. Also listed on Brisbane Bands directory.

name: Brothers In Groove (BIG)
notes: Based in Buderim. Sunshine Coast's ultimate cover band. Rock and groove party music. All members Sunshine Coast based. Rehearse regularly. 813 Facebook likes. Self-books directly and also listed on Brisbane Bands directory.

name: THE BLISS BAND
notes: Described as one of QLD's TOP cover bands. 1,000+ songs in repertoire. Male and female singers. Has played every major venue in Queensland. Hundreds of weddings worldwide. Expert at filling dancefloors. Travels nationwide. Top-booked Sunshine Coast band on CrowdPleaser.

name: Mo' Swagger
notes: Sunshine Coast cover band adding funk and soul to favourite covers. Available as duo, trio, or full band. Active Instagram and Facebook presence. Self-books. 1,086 Facebook likes.

name: Love Note Music
notes: Based on the Sunshine Coast. Acoustic duo and entertainment collective. Alt-country, folk, blues and roots style. Hundreds of weddings across Queensland. Also offer full 7-piece party band and DJs as part of their collective. Self-books. Active website 2025.

name: Brad & Brodie
notes: 5-star powerhouse duo providing acoustic live music and DJ services. Based in Brisbane and Sunshine Coast region. Male/female vocals. Acoustic plus DJ package. Comprehensive wedding day entertainment. Self-books. Active 2025.

name: Groove Sessions
notes: Brisbane-based DJ + live sax, percussion, and guitar combination. Signature fusion act positioned for premium weddings and corporate events. Instagram active March 2026. Phone: 0411 696 361.

name: Groove Prazz
notes: DJ + live percussion, saxophone, and guitar. Previously performed at Brisbane Riverfire (2012-2015), Palazzo Versace, Q1 Gold Coast, Brisbane Convention Centre, Noosa Triathlon. One of Brisbane's most established DJ/live hybrid acts. Via Instinct Music agency.

name: Groove Club
notes: DJ accompanied by percussion, saxophone and guitar. Magnetic funk-filled atmosphere with smooth organic rhythms. Listed on Brisbane Bands directory under wedding bands. Brisbane-based.

name: Oliver Keys Music
notes: Brisbane-based solo singer, guitarist, and one-man-band live looping artist. Servicing Brisbane, Sunshine Coast, and Regional Queensland. Refined musical skillset and captivating voice. Personalised packages. Active on Facebook (285 likes) and YouTube. Appears on Easy Weddings listings.

name: Boadz (Dale Boaden)
notes: Professional acoustic musician and DJ. Based on Sunshine Coast. Versatile: jazz, acoustic instrumentals through to DJ dancefloor anthems. Full-day wedding music coverage. Available up to 50km from Sunshine Coast. On Easy Weddings and CrowdPleaser. Self-books.

name: Malia Stirling Music
notes: Based in North Arm, Sunshine Coast. Australian folk-pop singer/songwriter/guitarist. Warm, soulful voice. Unique arrangements of couples' favourite songs. Available as soloist or duo. Active March 2026. On Easy Weddings Sunshine Coast.

name: Call Me Will
notes: Professional acoustic loop artist, DJ, and MC. Based Maroochydore, Sunshine Coast. Services Brisbane, Gold Coast, Tweed Heads. 1,166 Facebook likes. Listed on Easy Weddings and The Famos & Co agency. Half-day and full-day 'Peace of Mind' wedding packages. Active 2024-2025.

name: August West
notes: Folk-pop duo (Jess Irvine & Zeke Foster). Soaring harmonies, folky guitar lines. Based Brisbane, travels up to 500km. Repertoire from 50s to now. Also offers DJ option. On Easy Weddings and CrowdPleaser. Well-reviewed for SEQ weddings.

name: Baker Boys Band
notes: Australia's top wedding and events band. Est. 2005. Customisable 3 to 14 piece. Regular Brisbane showcase events. Previously toured with Crowded House, Gotye, Vance Joy, John Farnham, Melbourne Symphony Orchestra. Travels Australia-wide. Very premium and well-known national act active in Brisbane and Gold Coast.

name: 1 More Song Band
notes: 7-piece (expandable to 12) with dual vocalists, 4-piece rhythm section. High-energy choreographed performances. Motown, 80s, Top 40. Signature 3-hour continuous dance sets. Via EastCoast Entertainment agency. Strong wedding and corporate reputation.

name: The Famos & Co
notes: Queensland's premier wedding entertainment agency. Based Noosa. Serves Sunshine Coast, Brisbane, Gold Coast, Byron Bay, Toowoomba. Offers solo artists, acoustic duos, DJs with optional MC. 1,884 Facebook likes. Premium wedding market positioning.

name: Dr Groove
notes: Fresher Brisbane act crafted by SEQ's most seasoned professionals. Starts as duo, expandable to full big band spectacular. Dinner-to-dance format. Top 40s, Jazz, R&B, Rock, Musical Theatre. Dynamic entertainment concept.

name: The Cast
notes: Led by Chloe Castledine. Available from acoustic duo to 8-12 piece band. Wide repertoire: modern dance, funk, classic and soul. Optional horn section, backing vocalists, percussionists, backup dancers. Has performed for Adelaide United, Ronald McDonald House, Siemens. Via Keynote Entertainment.

name: City Groove
notes: 5-piece Brisbane cover band performing popular radio hits. Features some of Australia's most talented musicians collectively entertaining for many years. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Lure
notes: 2+ decades of live performance and corporate entertainment experience. Highly experienced act with extensive musical history. Via Brisbane Bands agency. Strong corporate positioning.

name: Cosmic Groove
notes: Thousands of ecstatic clients entertained by this Brisbane cover band. Considered one of the best in live music entertainment for the SEQ market. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Kickstart
notes: One of Brisbane's most enduring cover bands. Plays most of south-east Queensland's popular venues. Long-running act with proven track record. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Detroit
notes: 10-piece Brisbane band. Motown Show featuring Aretha Franklin, Marvin Gaye, The Temptations, The Supremes. Multiple show formats available. Large ensemble with significant production value.

name: Soul Essence
notes: 7-piece Funk, Soul, R&B and Jazz band. Fusion of funk, jazz and soul makes them unique. Experienced players have gigged with notable artists. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Jonny & The Cole Shots
notes: Est. 2008. Strong Oz Rock flavour. Singer Jonny Cole has experience in Melbourne pub scene. Huge voice and passionate stage presence. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Brizband
notes: Est. 2012. Built solid reputation on 'Variety is Back' concept. Gone from strength to strength. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Hot Sauce
notes: One of Brisbane's hottest party cover bands. Thousands of guests entertained. Understands how to work an audience. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Grand Alpha Funk
notes: Features some of Brisbane's most respected musicians. Freshest and funkiest good time party band in town. Funk cover specialists. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Mercury Soul
notes: Talented group of musicians performing wide variety of popular hits across pop, rock, and more. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Savvy
notes: 6 of Brisbane's most accomplished musicians. Energetic, fun and professional outfit. Hundreds of major corporate events. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: The Accidents
notes: Considered one of Australia's best corporate bands. Highly developed musicianship, irresistible vocals, technology-forward performances. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Ambient Jazz
notes: Performed for former Prime Minister of Australia. Extensive international performance history. Prestige positioning for high-end functions and weddings.

name: SOUL'D
notes: 10-piece band based in Byron Bay but performs regularly at all Gold Coast venues. Five-piece horn section, female and male vocalists, cooking rhythm section. Soul, Motown, Funk and RnB from the 60s-70s. Self-contained with own sound and lighting engineer.

name: Guitar & Flute Duo - Flute Salad
notes: 35 years of experience. Guitar and flute combination playing hits from 50s to now, jazz, Latin and classical. Based Sunshine Coast. 14 reviews on Entertainers Worldwide. Self-books.

name: Super Trouper ABBAsolutely Live
notes: 8-piece band with no backing tracks. ABBA tribute with strong live performance. Also incorporates The Doo Wop Dolls trio for 40s-70s music. Based Sunshine Coast. 9 reviews on Entertainers Worldwide.

name: Glenn Walton Jazz Duo/Trio/Quartet
notes: Professional jazz pianist. 25+ years leading duo/trio/quartet gigs on the Gold Coast. Has worked with jazz icons James Morrison, John Morrison, Richie Cole (USA). Bachelor of Music and Masters Degree. Gold Coast-based.

name: The Swich Band
notes: 6-piece ensemble based in Ipswich, Queensland (near Brisbane). Music inspired by childhood: John Mayer to Stevie Wonder, ABBA to Beyonce. Premium pricing position.

name: Michael Hayes Entertainment
notes: Offers live acoustic performances, wedding bands, DJs, and MC duties. Years of experience in Australia and abroad. Tailors each performance for perfect atmosphere. Listed on Easy Weddings Sunshine Coast.

name: Fiona O'Shea & The Passengers
notes: Top-booked band on CrowdPleaser for Sunshine Coast. Combines acoustic and full-band sets. Strong wedding and event reputation on the Sunshine Coast.

name: Brian Carlon (Solo, Duo, Trio, Band and DJ)
notes: Top-booked multi-format act on CrowdPleaser Sunshine Coast. Offers solo, duo, trio, band or DJ configurations for any event. Versatile and popular in the Sunshine Coast market.

name: Eighties Recall
notes: Top-booked 80s cover band on CrowdPleaser Sunshine Coast. Specialises in 80s hits. Strong niche positioning for themed events.

name: Cover Band Entertainment (The Naturals, Mighty Rhythm, 80s vs 90s Show, The ALIENS)
notes: Group of Brisbane based musicians offering multiple bands under one manager (Leroy Bath). Bands: The 80s vs 90s Tribute Show, The NATURALS classic hits, The Mighty Rhythm party band, The ALIENS rock band. Can supply PA systems and lightshows. Self-books or via preferred agent.

name: Renae And The Swing Collective
notes: One of Brisbane's hottest jazz bands. Takes audiences on a musical journey down memory lane. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: City Fever Show Band
notes: Performs at most large corporate events in cocktail/black-tie style. Flexible with performers adapting to audience needs. Showband format. Via Brisbane Bands agency.

name: Disco Disciples
notes: Gold Coast (Coolangatta) 70s disco tribute band. Authentic costumes with changes in intervals. Unique 1970s light-up drum kit — only one of this design in Australia. 841 Facebook likes. Travels nationwide. Well-reviewed on CrowdPleaser. Highly active in 2025.

name: James Dent Syndicate
notes: Versatile Gold Coast jazz/mixed-genre ensemble. Top-booked on CrowdPleaser Gold Coast wedding bands list. Wide repertoire across many genres. James Dent also performs as solo artist and band leader.

name: Hits & Lix
notes: Gold Coast professional upbeat party band. 80s, 90s, 00s to today. Female-fronted (Nat & Kat on vocals). Available as duo, trio, or 4-piece with live drummer. 18+ years experience. Self-books. Top-booked on CrowdPleaser Gold Coast.

name: Eternal Sunshine Party Band
notes: Described as 'SEQ's most sought after hybrid party band'. Based Brisbane. Active in 2025-2026 at venues including Redlands Sporting Club. Also visible at Gold Coast venues. Self-books via Facebook.

name: RJ Unplugged
notes: Gold Coast acoustic solo/duo plus DJ. Acoustic guitar with rhythmic percussion and dreamy vocals. Covers pre-ceremony through to couple send-off. Listed on Easy Weddings Gold Coast.

name: Flipside Band
notes: High-energy professional musicians with top-tier vocals. Extensive song list from 50s to today. Listed on Easy Weddings Gold Coast. Active and well-reviewed.

name: Rhythm & Gold
notes: Award-winning musicians with 15 years experience. Selected Top 10 Wedding Suppliers in Australia 2025 by City & Beach Magazine. Winners at Wedding Industry Awards 2024. Gold Coast based.

name: Miss Renee Simone
notes: Soulful live duo transitioning to full party band and DJ set. All-inclusive package. Free ceremony live music with bundle options. Gold Coast based. Listed on Easy Weddings.

name: Redtie Entertainment
notes: Queensland's most talented musicians across various lineup sizes. Options from intimate sophisticated background music to full dancefloor experience plus DJ/Sax option. High-end corporate positioning. Also listed on Easy Weddings Gold Coast. Fresh, modern young vibe.

name: JewelStars
notes: Based in Palm Beach, Gold Coast. Music & MC by Greg Wall and team. Options from acoustic solo to dynamic duo to full wedding band. Ceremony and reception coverage. Listed on Easy Weddings Gold Coast.

name: René Le Feuvre
notes: Live looping acoustic artist and DJ. 10+ years experience from intimate events to 50,000-person stadiums. Both ceremony acoustic and reception DJ services. World-class performer listed on Easy Weddings Gold Coast.
